issue.message: Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 23)
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)

This declaration is opt-in and its usage should be marked with `@androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi` or `@OptIn(markerClass = androidx.media3.common.util.UnstableApi.class)`

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

"splash_skip_hint" is not translated in "de" (German), "no" (Norwegian), "fi" (Finnish), "ru" (Russian), "pt" (Portuguese), "bg" (Bulgarian), "hr" (Croatian), "it" (Italian), "fr" (French), "hu" (Hungarian), "ta" (Tamil), "es" (Spanish), "sl" (Slovenian), "pl" (Polish), "ro" (Romanian), "nl" (Dutch), "tr" (Turkish)
Formatting %d followed by words ("seconds"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("contribution"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("contributions"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("result"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("results"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Very long vector path (4369 characters), which is bad for performance. Considering reducing precision, removing minor details or rasterizing vector.

The image `ic_launcher.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (72x72 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (48x48 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (96x96 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (144x144 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 66x66 dp (264x264 px)

The image `ic_launcher_round.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 72x72 dp (108x108 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 72x72 dp (72x72 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 108x108 dp (216x216 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 54x54 dp (162x162 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 66x66 dp (264x264 px)

issue.errorLine1: bmp.setPixel(x, y, if (matrix[x, y]) Color.BLACK else Color.WHITE)

issue.message: Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
